faqs.question: How much does drain fly treatment cost in Graniteville?
faqs.answer: Our drain fly treatment services in Graniteville range from $350 to $550, depending on the severity of the infestation, number of drains affected, and the size of your property. We provide free inspections and upfront pricing before beginning any treatment.

faqs.question: How quickly can you treat drain flies in Graniteville?
faqs.answer: We offer same-day and next-day service to Graniteville residents. Most drain fly treatments can be completed in a single visit lasting 1-2 hours, though severe infestations may require follow-up visits to ensure complete elimination.

faqs.question: What causes drain flies in Graniteville homes?
faqs.answer: Drain flies breed in the organic buildup inside drains, pipes, and areas with standing water. In Graniteville, we commonly find them in bathroom drains, basement floor drains, kitchen sinks, and commercial facility drainage systems where moisture and organic matter accumulate.

faqs.question: Are drain fly treatments safe for my family and pets?
faqs.answer: Yes, we use EPA-approved products and methods that are safe for your family and pets when applied by our licensed professionals. Our treatments target breeding sites directly and focus on sanitation and biological control methods that eliminate drain flies without harsh chemicals throughout your Graniteville property.
